nasb.text: The Philistine said to David, “Am I a dog, that you come to me with sticks?” And the Philistine cursed David by his gods.

esv.text: And the Philistine said to David, “Am I a dog, that you come to me with sticks?” And the Philistine cursed David by his gods.

cnv.text: 那非利士人對大衛說：“難道我是一條狗嗎？你竟拿杖來攻擊我。”於是指著自己的神咒詛大衛。

ccb.text: 他对大卫说：“你拿着棍子来战我，难道我是一条狗吗？”他就凭自己的神明咒诅大卫，
